title: Person
description: A person record returned by the Cambridge Lookup/Ibis web service API.

cancelled.description: Flag indicating if the person is cancelled.

identifier.description: The person's primary identifier (typically their CRSid).

visibleName.description: The person's display name if visible, otherwise registered name, surname, or primary identifier.

identifiers.description: A list of the person's identifiers (only populated when fetch includes all_identifiers).

attributes.description: A list of the person's attributes (only populated when requested via fetch).

value.description: The identifier's value in that scheme.
